summary: Follow credential clues from surfaced secret-bearing or token-bearing evidence toward the likely downstream service.
claim_boundary: Can claim that the visible evidence suggests a likely credential path and name the most plausible downstream service. Cannot claim the exact downstream target or that the setting is confirmed to reach it.
current_gap: The live family now joins backing evidence in one run, but it still needs periodic review so rows that only restate a source clue do not survive as fake grouped value.
